name: Genesis Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>創世竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ジェネシックドラゴン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per turn, you can send 1 Dragon-Type monster from your hand to the Graveyard to add 1 Dragon-Type monster from your Graveyard to your hand. When this card is sent from the field to the Graveyard, you can return all Dragon-Type monsters from your Graveyard to your Deck.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, you can send 1 Dragon-Type monster from your hand to the Graveyard to add 1 Dragon-Type monster from your Graveyard to your hand. When this card is sent from the field to the Graveyard, you can return all Dragon-Type monsters from your Graveyard to your Deck.
eff: Once per turn, you can send 1 Dragon-Type monster from your hand to the Graveyard to add 1 Dragon-Type monster from your Graveyard to your hand. When this card is sent from the field to the Graveyard, you can return all Dragon-Type monsters from your Graveyard to your Deck.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck: The Blue-Eyed Dragon's Thundering Descent

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
